name: Lentil Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 pound dried lentils, washed, picked over
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large soup pot, combine all ingredients except the wine and tomatoes.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 1-1/2 hours.
3. Add the wine and tomatoes, cover, and continue to simmer for 20-30 minutes more.
